title: Form with 5000 dropdown options
excerpt:
Hi, I’m trying to build a form with more than 5000 options in dropdown. 
any ideas? 
Meytal

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m trying to build a form with more than 5000 options in dropdown.
any ideas?

Meytal

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: I havent tried, but maybe put the 5000 options as items in a separate board, and either use a connect column instead, or use the VLOOKUP plugin. I dont think either will work on a Monday form, but I think Superform plugin will allow lookups to another table.

posts.author: meytalPeleg (Meytal Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes its the only option I guess.

Thanks!
